# Contact info and important links {#sec-contactinfo}

## Contact info {.unnumbered}

-   **General inquiries**: {{< var email.support >}}

-   **Jessica Kosie** (MB5 Project Lead): {{< var email.jessica >}}

-   **Martin Zettersten** (MB5 Project Lead): {{< var email.martin >}}

-   **Casey Lew-Williams** (MB5 Project Lead): {{< var email.casey >}}

-   **Heidi Baumgartner** (MB Exec. Director & MB5 Coordinator): {{< var email.heidi >}}

## Project listserv and Slack channels {.unnumbered}

-   **{{< var project.number >}} project listserv**: {{< var email.listserv >}} *Note: sending an email to this address will send it to everyone subscribed to the {{< var project.number >}} list; please use judiciously!*

    -   **SUBSCRIBE** to the {{< var link.listserv >}} *(click on "Join group" using a google-linked account, or fill out the* <a href="https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSewvzsv3YAwPKCAJmut_X6eVlu7P7TxbGe6vAWwG0CInI4YqA/viewform" target="_blank">MB listserv form</a> *to request to join)*
    
-   **ManyBabies Slack workspace**: {{< var link.slack >}}

    -   **BROWSE CHANNELS** and join *#mb5-general*, *#mb5-data-collection, and any other relevant channels.

## Important links {.unnumbered}

-   **ManyBabies website:** {{< var link.mbwebsite >}}

-   **{{< var project.number >}} project website**: {{< var link.projecturl >}}

-   **MB5 Stage 1 Registered Report**: {{< var link.stage1rr >}}

-   **MB5 Lab Manual** (this document): {{< var link.projectmanual >}}

-   **MB5 collaboration agreement**: {{< var link.collaboration >}} *(note: the MB5 collaboration agreement can also be found in the Appendix of this manual, see @sec-collaboration)*

-   **To report issues (e.g., with data collection, deviations from protocol, etc.) or to request support:** {{< var link.issue >}}

-   **To upload materials** (e.g., ethics approval, questionnaire, pilot data): {{< var link.greenlight >}}

-   **To upload experimental data**: {{< var link.upload >}}
